news.title:
DAM Capital upgrades Premier Energies to Buy with a TP of Rs 1295.
Key strengths: best-in-class cell efficiency, faster ramp-up, and in-house G12R, zero busbar tech.
news.summary:

news.title:
India's solar sector faces financial strain as lenders tighten credit due to overcapacity and tariffs.
Premier Energies plans a ₹12,000 crore capex for backward integration amid sector consolidation concerns.
news.summary:

news.title:
Premier Energies completes acquisition of 51% equity in HeliosAnthos Energies Pvt Ltd.
Acquisition involved 1,04,550 shares for INR 10.4L, making HeliosAnthos its subsidiary.
news.summary:

news.title:
Waaree and Premier Energies shares rose 2% on Thursday amid positive brokerage views.
Premier Energies traded at Rs 741.6, while Waaree surged to Rs 2764.5 during morning hours.
news.summary:
Waaree and Premier Energies shares rose 2% on Thursday amid positive brokerage views.

news.title:
Premier Energies prioritizes India's market, citing policy uncertainty abroad and minimal export exposure, particularly to the US.
India's solar demand remains strong; Premier Energies holds a 10% module and 15% cell share, focusing on AI-driven data center growth.
news.summary:
Premier Energies prioritizes India's market, citing policy uncertainty abroad and minimal export exposure, particularly to the US.
India's solar demand remains strong; Premier Energies holds a 10% module and 15% cell share, focusing on AI-driven data center growth.

news.title: Premier Energies surged over 9%, unaffected by the 126% US solar import duty.

news.title:
Premier Energies unaffected by US solar import duty of 126% due to no export exposure.
Waaree Energies has around 29% export exposure, making it potentially impacted.

Premier Energies shifts focus to exports, targeting Europe and US solar buyers.
This move follows buyers diversifying supply chains away from China.

news.title:
Premier Energies approves JV with 51% stake for EPC in renewable energy projects.
JV covers solar, wind, BESS, hybrid projects; Rs.10.45M investment for 51% equity.
news.summary:
Premier Energies approves JV with 51% stake for EPC in renewable energy projects.
JV covers solar, wind, BESS, hybrid projects; Rs.10.45M investment for 51% equity.

news.title:
Premier Energies Ltd forms a JV with BA Prerna Renewables, holding a 51% stake in HeliosAnthos Energies for renewable EPC projects.
The company extends acquisition timelines for stakes in Ksolare Energy and Transcon Ind Limited to April 15, 2026.
news.summary:
Premier Energies Ltd forms a JV with BA Prerna Renewables, holding a 51% stake in HeliosAnthos Energies for renewable EPC projects.
The company extends acquisition timelines for stakes in Ksolare Energy and Transcon Ind Limited to April 15, 2026.

news.title:
KEC International reports a strong Q3FY26 order book of over ₹41,000 Cr, led by T&D at ₹26,000 Cr. Shares closed at ₹611.35, down 4%.
Waaree Energies' order book reached ₹60,000 Cr in Q3FY26; Premier Energies and Ashoka Buildcon report robust growth and strong demand visibility.
news.summary:
KEC International reports a strong Q3FY26 order book of over ₹41,000 Cr, led by T&D at ₹26,000 Cr. Shares closed at ₹611.35, down 4%.
Waaree Energies' order book reached ₹60,000 Cr in Q3FY26; Premier Energies and Ashoka Buildcon report robust growth and strong demand visibility.

news.title:
Premier Energies reported record revenue and profit for Q3 FY26, with strong utilization and a healthy order book. Expansion added 400 MW cell and 350 MW module capacity.
The firm plans to commission 10.6 GW cell and 11.1 GW module capacity by FY28, making it India's largest integrated manufacturer. Demand and order pipeline remain robust.
news.summary:
Premier Energies reported record revenue and profit for Q3 FY26, with strong utilization and a healthy order book. Expansion added 400 MW cell and 350 MW module capacity.
The firm plans to commission 10.6 GW cell and 11.1 GW module capacity by FY28, making it India's largest integrated manufacturer. Demand and order pipeline remain robust.

news.title:
Waaree Energies and Premier Energies lead India's solar growth, backed by strong order books of Rs 60,000 crore and Rs 13,724 crore, respectively.
Waaree focuses on scale and integration, while Premier excels in efficiency with RoCE of 41.1% and ROE of 53.6%.
news.summary:
Waaree Energies and Premier Energies lead India's solar growth, backed by strong order books of Rs 60,000 crore and Rs 13,724 crore, respectively.
Waaree focuses on scale and integration, while Premier excels in efficiency with RoCE of 41.1% and ROE of 53.6%.

news.summary: Premier Energies aims to sustain margins by passing increased costs to customers.
